scripts.build:landing-page: cd landing-page && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && mkdir -p dist && cp -r landing-page/dist/* dist/
scripts.build:admin-web: cd admin-web-app && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && mkdir -p dist && cp -r admin-web-app/dist/* dist/
scripts.build:marketplace-web: cd marketplace-web-app && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && mkdir -p dist && cp -r marketplace-web-app/dist/* dist/
scripts.build:owner-portal: cd owner-mobile-app && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && mkdir -p dist && cp -r owner-mobile-app/dist/* dist/
